attacking_style: Attacks over mountain summits with 5-10km descents remaining, exploiting superior descending skills rather than pure climbing power. Opportunistic rather than sustained power-based attacks.
team_tactics: Relies on high-altitude domestique pacing (Carapaz) when defending position, but team support appears limited when attacking. Positioned as protected GC rider within Ineos hierarchy.
terrain_preference: Alpine stages with technical descents after summits strongly favor him. Exposed on sustained steep climbs when race intensifies and on long gravel/classics terrain requiring endurance power.
vulnerability: Time trials cost critical GC positions (5 seconds from podium in 2023). Third-week fade pattern evident with significant drops on penultimate stages. Cannot follow when elite climbers accelerate.
key_patterns: Descending superiority over pure climbers creates stage-winning opportunities (Tour 2023 alpine stage win)
Third-week collapse pattern: significant GC losses on penultimate stages in multi-week races (2x)
Consistently performs above expectations early/mid-race but fades when racing intensifies (4 observations)
Time trial weakness costs podium positions despite strong mountain performance (5-second podium loss)
Cannot match accelerations of top-tier climbers on steepest gradients, last dropped from elite groups
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 showed improved stage-race resilience versus 2022 collapse, but persistent TT/third-week weaknesses limit GC ceiling
